final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 3×3 nine-grid poster for 小红书, designed to be cut into 9 individual square cards after export.

Style/medium: needs a "ins风治愈感睡眠疗愈" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 小红书爆款知识科普图文 design tradition, Kinfolk magazine minimalist editorial layout, 新中式奶油风 lifestyle visual culture; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a strict 3-column × 3-row nine-grid layout; each grid cell clearly separated by visible thin borders or gutters; all content centered within each cell; no text or titles placed near cut lines; each cell functions as an independent 小红书 card while maintaining unified visual style across all 9
Subject: must include all 9 grid cells with the following content:
  格1（封面）: 大标题「让你倒头就睡的8个 tips」，副标题「失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏」，配图元素：柔软床铺、月亮、枕头、眼罩，封面最吸睛，标题突出，排版高级
  格2: 标题「1. 睡前1小时别玩手机」，正文「蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。」，配图元素：手机、月亮、困倦表情小插画
  格3: 标题「2. 睡前把灯光调暗」，正文「暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。」，配图元素：床头灯、暖黄色灯光、窗帘
  格4: 标题「3. 房间温度别太高」，正文「稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。」，配图元素：空调、温度计、被子
  格5: 标题「4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡」，正文「咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。」，配图元素：咖啡杯、茶杯、禁止符号
  格6: 标题「5. 睡前洗个热水澡」，正文「能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。」，配图元素：浴室蒸汽、毛巾、热水
  格7: 标题「6. 脑子停不下来就写下来」，正文「把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。」，配图元素：笔记本、钢笔、小台灯
  格8: 标题「7. 固定上床时间」，正文「每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。」，配图元素：时钟、月亮、床
  格9: 标题「8. 试试深呼吸放松法」，正文「吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。」，底部小字「收藏这组，今晚试试看」，配图元素：呼吸线条、闭眼人物、星星
Scene/backdrop: must include a unified warm cream-toned background across all 9 cells; light illustrative decorative elements (枕头、月亮、星星、热牛奶、香薰、书本、眼罩、窗帘、床铺) used as soft accent illustrations
Lighting/mood: needs a gentle, healing, sleep-therapy atmosphere — exact mood execution is yours
Color palette: must be cream-white (奶油白), light beige (浅米色), soft oat (淡燕麦色), and pale caramel (浅焦糖色) as dominant tones; deep brown (深棕色) for all body text; warm and soothing overall
Materials/textures: needs a light skeuomorphic illustration style (轻拟物插画) with clean editorial typography — exact texture execution is yours
Text (verbatim): must include all Chinese text as specified per grid cell above; all text must be Chinese only, large, legible, and typographically clean
Constraints: must preserve strict 3×3 grid structure suitable for direct cutting into 9 independent square images; each cell must be self-contained and readable after cropping; no text bleeding across cell boundaries; magazine-quality layout, 小红书爆款 aesthetic
Avoid: English text, garbled characters, cheap marketing feel, overly decorative or cluttered layouts, text placed near cut lines
